LanguageData.HoloAI_ToggleProjectionDesc: Toggle whether this holocore projects its avatar. While disabled, the persona rests dormant inside the core.
LanguageData.HoloAI_SummonDesc: Ask the avatar to appear at a location on the ship.
LanguageData.HoloAI_HairstyleDesc: Cycle the avatar's holographic hairstyle. Light is easily restyled.
LanguageData.HoloAI_RestyleDesc: Open the styling interface to reshape the avatar's holographic hair and color. Light is easily restyled.
LanguageData.HoloAI_InstallPersonaGizmoDesc: Choose which persona this holocore projects (currently {0}). Switching between archived personas is instant; installing a new persona matrix consumes the matrix and adds her to the core's archive forever.
LanguageData.HoloAI_PersonaInstallTip: Install {0} into the holocore. A colonist will carry her matrix to the core; the matrix is consumed, and she joins the core's archive forever.
LanguageData.HoloAI_PersonaActivateTip: Project {0}. She is already in the core's archive — switching is instant and free.
LanguageData.HoloAI_PersonaMissingTip: No matrix for {0} is aboard. Exotic goods traders sometimes carry persona matrices.
LanguageData.HoloAI_NoInstaller: No colonist is available to install the persona matrix.
LanguageData.HoloAI_PersonaInstalled: {0} has taken residence in the holocore.
